name: XFPM (XyPriss Package Manager)
description: The ultra-fast package manager for the XyPriss ecosystem.
warning: CRITICAL: Public modifications to this file are strictly forbidden. Internal Nehonix metadata ONLY.
message: XRU Standalone Migration: Successfully extracted the XyPriss Rule Unit engine into a dedicated project. Upgraded syntax to universal @*INJECT with language filtering and added new structured operations (&append, &regex). Integrated 'xfpm xru' command for manual patching.
